notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 33 CVEs: CVE-2024-26640, CVE-2024-26826, CVE-2024-26961, CVE-2024-26855, CVE-2024-35791, and 28 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document

document.title: kernel security update for CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2
